CONTENT.Club career: Zortea played for Atalanta under-19 squad in the 2017–18 and 2018–19 seasons.On 30 July 2019, Zortea joined Serie B club Cremonese on a two-year loan.Zortea made his professional Serie B debut for Cremonese on 24 August 2019 in a game against Venezia. He substituted Michele Castagnetti in the added time.On 19 July 2021, Zortea joined Serie A club Salernitana on loan.On 31 January 2023, Zortea moved on loan to Sassuolo, with an option to buy.On 18 January 2024, Zortea moved on a new loan to Frosinone.On 17 July 2024, Zortea officially transferred to fellow Serie A side Cagliari on a permanent deal.

SUMMARY: Nadir Zortea (born 19 June 1999) is an Italian professional footballer who plays as a right-back for Serie A club Cagliari.
